products.name: AiPOWER SC2300i-H Inverter Generator Petrol 2300 wa i-Power emergency generator: 2300 watt gasoline inverterThe gasoline-powered, and mobile-use (portable) inverter generator SC2300i-H from a i-Power runs on a 79cc 4-stroke engine that generates up to 2,300 watts (starting power).a i-Power power generators "Inverter" are in terms of engine technology and equipment a product of the absolute upper class and have a great look that represents power and performance. For example, this engine is equipped with a low oil cut-off automatic and is designed for long life and easy maintenance. With a tank of over 4 liters, this generator can run for up to 12 hours.
